response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 15+ years and recent AI infrastructure work, but lacks the strategic leadership experience, director-level scope, and demonstrated AI product expertise required for this principal engineer role. Background is primarily hands-on individual contributor work rather than guiding technical strategy, identifying product direction, and advising enterprise customers on cloud/AI adoption.
strengths: Meets 15+ years experience requirement with solid technical breadth across web, infrastructure, and emerging AI technologies
Entrepreneurial founder of GISCollective platform demonstrates ability to build and evolve complex systems from concept to production
Recent focus on AI infrastructure (MCP, agent frameworks) and thought leadership through workshops and open-source projects show engagement with strategic technologies
concerns: Limited demonstrated expertise building AI products at scale; recent pivot to AI infrastructure lacks evidence of strategic decision-making or customer impact
No clear evidence of director-level responsibilities, strategic advising of enterprise customers, or influencing product direction at organizational scale
Resume employment timeline shows multiple overlapping positions from 2012-2014, raising credibility concerns and making actual tenure unclear

key_factors.factor: Years of experience and technical breadth
